name: scheduled-digest
title: Digest
planned: scheduled-digest workflow builder — the reusable read → summarize → deliver → log ENGINE that generalises the identical middle+tail of dirnotif-digest + analytics-digest; the caller (a typed CONSUMER) supplies the source-read + compose nose-cone via slots. Owns the Compute Period, before-delivery dedup, Extract-Facts grounding gate, fail-open LLM summary seam, delivery legs, and idempotent log; not yet snapshotted here (mapped to schedule-dispatcher for the cron spine + notification-fanout for the signed delivery leg)

tmpl_scheduled_digest_log SQL — the brick-exclusive send-log / run ledger (one row per client per period, UNIQUE(client_id, period_key) the exactly-once arbiter); the generic idempotent-run-log.sql snapshot shows its shape, the concrete brick table is not yet authored here
